scripts.dev: concurrently -n gw,auth,user,course,enr,search,pay,wallet,payout,notif,sup,ach,analytics -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm:dev -w api-gateway" "npm:dev -w auth-service" "npm:dev -w user-service" "npm:dev -w course-service" "npm:dev -w enrollment-service" "npm:dev -w search-service" "npm:dev -w payment-service" "npm:dev -w wallet-service" "npm:dev -w payout-service" "npm:dev -w notification-service" "npm:dev -w support-service" "npm:dev -w achievement-service" "npm:dev -w analytics-service"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n gw,auth,user,course,enr,search,pay,wallet,payout,notif,sup,ach,analytics -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm:start -w api-gateway" "npm:start -w auth-service" "npm:start -w user-service" "npm:start -w course-service" "npm:start -w enrollment-service" "npm:start -w search-service" "npm:start -w payment-service" "npm:start -w wallet-service" "npm:start -w payout-service" "npm:start -w notification-service" "npm:start -w support-service" "npm:start -w achievement-service" "npm:start -w analytics-service"
scripts.typecheck: for d in shared api-gateway auth-service user-service course-service enrollment-service search-service payment-service wallet-service payout-service notification-service support-service achievement-service analytics-service; do echo "— $d"; tsc --noEmit -p $d/tsconfig.json || exit 1; done
